title: Extreme Weather Shelters - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search 3 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF SEVERE WEATHER LINN COUNTY LINN COUNTY BOARD OF COMMISSIONERS SEVERE WEATHER SHELTER LOCATOR Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information on warming centers during a severe weather event. May offer additional warming resources. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Warming centers operate during the winter months and during severe weather advisories. Locations are open either throughout the winter season or when temperature thresholds are met. Visit Website More Details SEVERE WEATHER LINN COUNTY THE RIVER CENTER OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers overnight shelter temperatures reach 32 degrees or below. Snacks will be available. 3000 S Santiam Highway Lebanon, OR 97355 Eligibility: Age 18 and older and families with minor children. Pets allowed. Hours: Open 7 days per week when temperatures reach 32 degrees or below 7pm-7am Shelter will close at 10pm if there are zero participants (541) 451-1271 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SEVERE WEATHER LINN COUNTY SWEET HOME POLICE DEPARTMENT OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers overnight shelter when temperatures are extremely cold. 1950 Main Street Sweet Home, OR 97386 Hours: Open 24 hours per day / 7 days per week when temperatures reach 32 degrees or below Email (541) 967-3950 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SEVERE WEATHER LINN COUNTY OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER SEVERE WEATHER LINN COUNTY OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER
